panels.title: ⏰ Time-Locked Goods
panels.infobox: 🌟 Time-limited goods disappear at month end if you haven't found the rumor. Sell one of each for the *Exemplary Merchant* achievement.

panels.title: ⚗️ Alchemy Goods
panels.infobox: Alchemy goods are unlocked via the side quest in Ulrich.

entry_Product.name: Beer → Whiskey

entry_Product.name: Iron → Steel
